code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = io.read_line()
  let nums_str = match line1
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let line2 = io.read_line()
  let target_str = match line2
  when Some(s)
    string.trim(s)
  when None
    ""
  end

  let target = match string.parse_int(target_str)
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    return Err("invalid target")
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(nums_str)
  let n = tokens.len()

  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let val = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, val)
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut found = false
  mut result_i = 0
  mut result_j = 0
  mut pi = 0
  while pi < nums.len() and not found
    mut pj = pi + 1
    while pj < nums.len() and not found
      let vi = match nums.get(pi)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      let vj = match nums.get(pj)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if vi + vj == target
        found = true
        result_i = pi
        result_j = pj
      end
      pj = pj + 1
    end
    pi = pi + 1
  end

  if found
    print("found=#{result_i},#{result_j}")
  else
    print("none")
  end

  Ok(())
end
